query:
-- Testar JOIN com COALESCE para normalizar batch
SELECT 
  bci.id as bci_id,
  bci.conferenceId,
  bci.productId,
  bci.batch as bci_batch,
  roi.batch as roi_batch,
  roi.expectedQuantity
FROM blindConferenceItems bci
LEFT JOIN blindConferenceSessions bcs ON bcs.id = bci.conferenceId
LEFT JOIN receivingOrderItems roi ON (
  roi.receivingOrderId = bcs.receivingOrderId
  AND roi.productId = bci.productId
  AND roi.tenantId = bci.tenantId
  AND COALESCE(roi.batch, '') = COALESCE(bci.batch, '')
)
ORDER BY bci.id DESC
LIMIT 15;
